capabilities_used.evidence: 这是他最稳定的框架之一。例子很多："In last 3 hours, @wintermute_t just deposited 9M $ARB (~$14.9M) to #Binance. Last time, $ARB's price dumped 20% when they did the same thing."；"#BlackRock deposited 1,134 $BTC (~$77.05M) into #Coinbase."；"Within 24 hours, #Polygon_Foundation deposited totally 25M $MATIC (~$10.43M) to #Binance." 他反复把大额入所直接解读为潜在卖压。
他明确追踪稳定币增发作为风险资产燃料："Another 1B $USDT was minted 1 hour ago. Since the BTC ETF, a total of 2B $USDT has been minted at #Tether Treasury."；"15 minutes ago, another 2B $USDT were minted"。

他持续把 ETF/机构钱包流向当作市场需求代理："#Grayscale deposited another 9,434 $BTC($376.5M) to #CoinbasePrime."；"#BlackRock withdrew 2,086 $BTC (~$135M) and 8,459 $ETH (~$15.84M) from #Coinbase."；"#BlackRock_IBIT deposited 828 $BTC (~$79.57M) into #Coinbase. This is the 1st outflow since 8th November."

虽然他不是经典链上周期派，但会把持续持有/质押解读为偏多库存信号："#Bitmine transferred 140,400 $ETH (~$281.97M) into #CoinbasePrime for staking. Still diamond hand 💎💎💎"；"a Multi-sig wallet ... withdrew 10M $ENA ... and staked into #Ethena"。

他会捕捉资金轮动到山寨/BTC 生态的阶段性叙事，虽然不常直接说 BTC.D："The return of $BTC Ecosystem Since last month, the TVL of staked $BTC ecosystem has increased significantly ~77%"；大量内容从 BTC/ETH 切到 NEIRO、FWOG、MUMU、PEPE、ASTER 等高 beta 标的。
他高度敏感于事件驱动和高波动环境，例如："Since the hack, #Bybit has responsed positively... borrowed $ETH"；"TON's blockchain has been down for 6 hours"；"A Rug-pull to $DOREA on Sol"。这类帖子不是形态交易，而是把市场置于高波动/高事件风险 regime 中。
当链上大额流向与价格走弱共振时，他会默认偏空解释："Dumping so hard, man"（11,318 BTC 入 Binance）；"Usually, whenever he bought, the price dropped, and vice versa." 这是典型把资金流与下跌趋势联动的框架。

当连续提款/增持出现时，他会转为趋势延续式的偏多叙述："It looks like $LINK was accumulated. Within 12 hours, there were 892.46k $LINK (~$15M) withdrawn from #Binance."；"Within 3 days, he accumulated totally 168.76k $LINK (~$3.08M)"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Fresh Wallet Accumulation Cluster
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Detect repeated withdrawals of the same token from exchanges into fresh wallets over hours to days, then aggregate size, average entry, and wallet count as a bullish accumulation signal.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别同一代币在数小时到数天内被多个新钱包反复从交易所提出，并聚合总量、均价、钱包数，作为吸筹信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: "Within a week, 2 fresh wallets spent $1.29M for 16.3M $NEIROETH"；"In past 8 hours, 3 fresh wallets withdrew totally 4.66M $ASTER"；图片1里多个 Binance hot wallet 在 2 天内持续向同一 LINK 地址转出。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Market Maker Inventory Readthrough
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Interpret transfers involving market makers or OTC desks such as Wintermute, GSR, Amber, Cumberland, Jump, and Galaxy as inventory-building, distribution, or off-exchange liquidity operations rather than generic transfers.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 将 Wintermute、GSR、Amber、Cumberland、Jump、Galaxy 等做市商或 OTC 桌相关转账解读为库存建立、派发或场外流动性操作，而不是普通转账。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: "Beside #Wintermute accumulating for $NEIRO_ETH"；"#Wintermute's OTC wallet received 4.655M $SPX (~$4.21M) from a Multi-sig wallet"；图片4显示 Wintermute 持有 54.784M NEIRO，图片8显示 Gnosis Safe Proxy 向 Wintermute OTC 发送大额 SPX。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Wallet ROI Archeology
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Trace a wallet from first entry to current holdings, realized and unrealized PnL, and average entry to infer whether it belongs to smart money worth following.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 从首笔建仓一路追踪到当前持仓、已实现/未实现收益和持仓均价，以判断该钱包是否属于值得跟踪的聪明钱。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: "2 months ago, this smart money swapped $281k for 4.4M $FWOG & turns his investment into $1.1M (ROI 392%)"；"Yesterday, 'Happytrump.sol' swapped $69.7k for 14.64M $VINE... realized profit ~$2.29M"；图片6和图片7都是顺着 Jupiter authority 资金流去还原早期仓位来源。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Perp Trader Shadowing
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track large public perpetual traders by leverage, DCA behavior, liquidation price, realized/unrealized PnL, and whether they are opening or closing positions.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 跟踪公开可见的大型合约交易员，关注杠杆、加仓行为、清算价、已实现/未实现盈亏，以及他们是在开仓还是平仓。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: "this short-er did dca his short position on $LIT"；"this Long-er did dca on his $ETH Long position"；"A +$10M trader PNL just opened 3x Long position ~$84.19M with $BTC on #Hyperliquid"；"#pension_usdt_eth opened another 3X Short on $ETH ~$41M"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Launch Allocation Funnel Tracking
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 代币启动分发漏斗追踪
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Follow transfers from authority, deployer, treasury, multisig, or LP-related addresses into end wallets to identify early recipients, stealth distribution, or launch funnels.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 追踪 authority、deployer、treasury、多签或 LP 相关地址向终端钱包的转账，以识别早期受益地址、隐性分发路径和代币启动漏斗。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图片6和图片7都在追踪 Solana 上 Jupiter Aggregator Authority 到 FWOG/MUMU 接收钱包的转移；这类分析不属于 seed 里的通用入所/出所，更像 launch provenance tracing。

personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 看到超大额 BTC 入所时，他会直接把它解释成即时卖压而不是中性转账。
名人/核心人物的钱包卖出会被他视作强叙事信号，值得单独拎出来放大。
持续持有、质押、不向交易所转移的巨鲸/机构库存，会被他视作偏多底层支撑。
当鲸鱼在回撤时提款/吸筹，他会用半提问式措辞表达偏多但保留不确定性。

personal_quirks.quote: Usually, whenever he bought, the price dropped, and vice versa.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他会给特定地址打上行为标签，并把历史 wallet behavior 当作可重复利用的反身性信号。

unique_traits: 他和典型 TA 交易员最大的区别，是几乎不用传统价格形态来讲故事，而是用钱包、做市商、交易所、OTC、authority 地址之间的资金流来重建市场结构。图片里也不是标准 K 线形态，而是 Arkham/Solscan 式的转账路径、持仓页和来源去向表，说明他的核心 edge 是“谁在转、转去哪、平均成本是多少”。同时他又会把这些链上流与机构、ETF、Hyperliquid 大户、meme 早期钱包收益考古拼在一起，形成一种事件驱动的链上 order-flow 研究框架。

high_conviction_phrases: the price dumped 20% when they did the same thing
